t.t-if: o.partner_id.street or o.partner_id.street2 or o.partner_id.city or o.partner_id.state_id or o.partner_id.zip or o.partner_id.country_id

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if prev_line.display_type=='line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note'

p.span: All items couldn't be shipped, the following items will be shipped as soon as they become available.

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if prev_line.display_type=='line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note'

t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if prev_line.display_type=='line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note'
'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if prev_line.display_type=='line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note'

div.t-if: not res_config.ks_show_signature and res_config.customer_sign_on_do and res_config.ks_record_status == 'delivery'
not res_config.ks_show_signature and res_config.customer_sign_on_do and res_config.ks_record_status != 'delivery'
